sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this shmup title

special_mechanics.name: Dual Cannons
special_mechanics.description: Ship features a pair of dual cannons that can be modified to point forwards, backwards, or diagonally, and can be arranged parallel to each other

special_mechanics.name: Power-Up System
special_mechanics.description: Collecting capsules provides power-ups including homing missiles, piercing laser, and wide shot that upgrade the Sol-Feace's abilities

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Sol-Deace is a horizontal-scrolling shmup with no documented jump physics or gravity mechanics (player controls a starship). No sub-pixel precision data available. Movement parameters are undocumented; gameplay is characterized as 'fast-paced' and 'frantic' by contemporary reviews.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Sol-Feace article (covers gameplay mechanics, development, and reception)
